title.en: I'm forever grateful! 진심으로 감사드립니다! 평생 잊지 않을게요!

description.en: When you receive life-changing help! Practice expressing deep gratitude with 진심으로 감사드립니다 and 평생 잊지 않을게요.
description.ko: 평생 잊지 못할 큰 도움을 받았을 때! 진심으로 감사드립니다와 평생 잊지 않을게요를 사용해 깊은 예의와 감사를 표현해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Deep Gratitude. Formal. Respect. Emotion. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 저 오늘 고등학교 때 선생님을 만나고 왔는데 정말 뭉클했어요.
content.translation: John. I met my high school teacher today and it was so touching.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 제가 가장 힘들 때 포기하지 않게 도와주신 분이거든요.
content.translation: He was the person who helped me not to give up when I was struggling the most.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Oh. that's so sweet. Did you tell him how you feel?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 선생님 손을 잡고 말씀드렸어요.
content.translation: Yes. I held my teacher's hand and told him.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 선생님. 진심으로 감사드립니다.
content.translation: Teacher. I'm forever grateful.

content.speaker: John
content.text: I'm sure he was very moved. It's so important to express that kind of deep gratitude.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 그리고 평생 잊지 않을게요 라고도 약속했어요.
content.translation: Right. and I also promised that I'll never forget it for the rest of my life.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 진심으로 감사드립니다. This sounds very formal and sincere.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 진심이라는 단어는 마음속 깊은 곳을 뜻해요.
content.translation: Yes. The word 'Jin-sim' means deep inside the heart.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그래서 그냥 고맙다는 말보다 훨씬 더 무겁고 진지한 감사가 느껴지는 표현이죠.
content.translation: So. it's an expression where you can feel a much heavier and more sincere gratitude than just saying thank you.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 진심으로 감사드립니다.
content.translation: I'm forever grateful.

content.speaker: John
content.text: And what about 평생 잊지 않을게요.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 평생은 나의 남은 인생 전체를 의미해요.
content.translation: Pyeong-saeng means my entire remaining life.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 당신의 은혜를 죽을 때까지 기억하겠다는 아주 강력하고 감동적인 약속이에요.
content.translation: It's a very powerful and touching promise to remember your favor until the day I die.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 평생 잊지 않을게요.
content.translation: I'll never forget it for the rest of my life.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine I'm a billionaire and I decided to pay for all your college tuition.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존! 정말요? 제 대학교 등록금을 다 내주신다고요?
content.translation: John! Really? You're going to pay all my college tuition?

content.speaker: John
content.text: Yes. Consider it a gift for being a great podcast partner.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 세상에나! 존 진심으로 감사드려요.
content.translation: Oh my god. John. I'm forever grateful.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 덕분에 걱정 없이 공부할 수 있게 됐어요.
content.translation: Thanks to you. I can study without any worries.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Just promise me you'll graduate with top honors.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 당연하죠! 존의 이 은혜. 평생 잊지 않을게요.
content.translation: Of course! This favor from you. I'll never forget it for the rest of my life.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 제가 나중에 꼭 보답하겠습니다!
content.translation: I will definitely repay you later!

content.speaker: John
content.text: I'll be waiting for that repayment. Mina!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Real gratitude can build bridges that last a lifetime.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 누군가에게 인생의 큰 도움을 받았다면 주저하지 말고 오늘 배운 깊은 표현들을 써보세요.
content.translation: Right. If you've received great life-help from someone. don't hesitate and use the deep expressions we learned today.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 진심이 담긴 말 한마디가 상대방에게는 가장 큰 보람이 될 수 있거든요.
content.translation: Because a single word spoken with sincerity can be the greatest reward for the other person.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "deeply grateful" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 진심으로 감사드립니다! I'm forever grateful!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 평생 잊지 않을게요! I'll never forget your kindness!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 은혜를 잊지 않겠습니다! I won't forget your favor!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 어떻게 감사드려야 할지 모르겠어요! I don't know how to thank you!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 평생의 은인입니다! You are my lifelong benefactor!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 주변의 소중한 분들에게 진심을 전하는 하루 되시길 바랄게요.
content.translation: I hope you all have a day expressing your sincerity to the precious people around you.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 저는 진심으로 당신을 응원해요. (I sincerely support you.)
평생 당신만을 사랑할게요. (I will love only you for my entire life.)
선생님의 은혜에 보답하고 싶어요. (I want to repay my teacher's favor.)
당신은 저에게 평생의 은인입니다. (You are a lifelong benefactor to me.)
어제 배운 단어를 그새 잊어버렸어요. (I already forgot the word I learned yesterday.)
주신 사랑에 보답하도록 노력하겠습니다. (I will try to repay the love you've given me.)
